title: About Me
paragraphs: I am a Ph.D. candidate in Astrophysics and Astronomy at Macquarie University, Australia, supported by the Australian Commonwealth Government RTP Scholarship. My research focuses on applying machine-learning techniques and data-driven methods to Galactic Archaeology using large spectroscopic surveys such as GALAH, Gaia-RVS, and Gaia-ESO.

I am also an Early-Career Researcher at the European Southern Observatory (ESO) in Garching, Germany, where I collaborate on data-driven stellar spectroscopy and chemical abundance analysis. Alongside research, I actively contribute to the astronomy community through academic service, student representation, leadership, outreach, and public engagement.

values: Galactic Archaeology -- Chemical Tagging; Accreted Stellar Populations; Light (Li) & Neutron Capture elemental abundances
Machine Learning, Data-driven Modelling, Stellar Spectroscopy
